creator: peixoto.cassiano@gmail.com
text:
After last update to 0.3.5_2,2, c-icap is crashing with the following error:

Dec 18 21:15:55 squid c-icap: : main proc, Error allocation posix proc mutex, errno: 22  
Dec 18 21:15:55 squid c-icap: : main proc, Can't init mutex for accepting conenctions. Fatal error, exiting!  

I removed all loaded c-icap-modules, but didn't work yet.
